testcase.name: test_get_settings_has_auto_print_receipt_and_drawer

failure.message: AssertionError: GET /api/settings.print missing auto_print_receipt assert 'auto_print_receipt' in {'auto_print_z': True, 'footer_line': 'Merci de votre visite', 'paper_width_mm': 80, 'shop_name': 'Le Bistrot du Coin'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_print_settings.py:36: in test_get_settings_has_auto_print_receipt_and_drawer assert "auto_print_receipt" in p, "GET /api/settings.print missing auto_print_receipt" E AssertionError: GET /api/settings.print missing auto_print_receipt E assert 'auto_print_receipt' in {'auto_print_z': True, 'footer_line': 'Merci de votre visite', 'paper_width_mm': 80, 'shop_name': 'Le Bistrot du Coin'}

testcase.name: test_put_settings_persists_receipt_and_drawer

failure.message: AssertionError: PUT did not persist auto_print_receipt assert None is True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc6b16c42dc0>('auto_print_receipt') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc6b16c42dc0> = {'auto_print_z': True, 'footer_line': 'TEST_Footer', 'paper_width_mm': 80, 'shop_name': 'TEST_Shop'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_print_settings.py:55: in test_put_settings_persists_receipt_and_drawer assert saved.get("auto_print_receipt") is True, \ E AssertionError: PUT did not persist auto_print_receipt E assert None is True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc6b16c42dc0>('auto_print_receipt') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc6b16c42dc0> = {'auto_print_z': True, 'footer_line': 'TEST_Footer', 'paper_width_mm': 80, 'shop_name': 'TEST_Shop'}.get
